table.noDataDescription: Add a new holiday to get started.

success.title: Holiday deleted successfully

branchAssignment.title: Branch Assignment

noBranches.label: No branches selected:
noBranches.description: The holiday will be applied generically to all branches in the system.

withBranches.label: Selected branches ({count}):
withBranches.description: The holiday will be applied exclusively to the selected branches.

branchAssignment.tooltip: If you don't select any branches, the holiday will apply to all branches. If you select specific branches, the holiday will only apply to those branches.

isWaivable.label: Is waivable
isWaivable.description: Indicates if the holiday can be waived by the worker

massive.title: Bulk Holiday Import
massive.message: The following holidays will be imported from the official API:
massive.noHolidaysMessage: Select a year and click "Load Holidays" to see available holidays

branchAssignment.title: Branch Assignment

noBranches.label: No branches selected:
noBranches.description: Holidays will be applied generically to all branches in the system.

withBranches.label: Selected branches ({count}):
withBranches.description: Holidays will be applied exclusively to the selected branches.

branchAssignment.tooltip: If you don't select any branches, the holiday will apply to all branches. If you select specific branches, the holiday will only apply to those branches.
